steps.title: Find the supporting reason pattern
steps.content: The passage gives a reason why Houston Black is fitting: it's abundant across the state. The next sentence introduces a second reason supporting the same conclusion: it plays an important agricultural role. This is additive—we're stacking reasons, not contrasting them.

steps.title: Match to the additive structure
steps.content: ”Additionally” means “in addition to what was just said,” introducing a second reason for the same conclusion. The other three signal temporal, oppositional, or alternative meanings—none of which fit. That matches choice A — A is correct.
